overall.description: Static shot of a medieval stone fireplace with animated flames, flanked by large lion statues in what appears to be a fantasy tavern or great hall interior from a video game engine. The camera remains completely stationary throughout the clip, focusing on the burning hearth.

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a grand medieval stone fireplace with burning flames, flanked by two imposing stone lion statues. The gothic architecture features carved mantelpieces and arched doorways on either side, with warm firelight illuminating the stone interior. No movement or changes occur throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a completely static perspective of a grand medieval hearth, preserving a consistent atmosphere of warmth and stillness. It begins with a focused view of burning flames within a massive stone fireplace, flanked by two imposing stone lion statues. As the fire flickers, the warm light continues to illuminate the intricate gothic carvings of the mantelpieces and the surrounding arched doorways. The scene remains unchanging, holding its steady gaze on the glowing embers and the silent stone architecture of the great hall.
